name: Nevada State Contractors Board License Search
updateFrequency: unknown; verify against the official license search before relying on freshness assumptions
knownExclusions: This registry entry is for an official lookup path, not a confirmed bulk download.
Local permits, business registrations, and other state or local authorizations may be outside NSCB scope.
rateLimitNotes: No adapter is implemented. Do not automate lookup pages unless access terms and technical controls are reviewed.
publicRecordsNotes: Official lookup source metadata only. Absence from this source is not proof that a license does not exist elsewhere.
officialBulkDownloadNotes: No official bulk download has been confirmed in this phase.
researchNotes: Registry-only source for now because the official path is lookup-oriented.
maintainerNotes: Future work should first look for a documented public export before considering portal automation.
